series_metadata.series_title: MT- Supervisory/ or Administrative Actions From Allegations Originating from Licensee exam.
series_metadata.series_description: Documents related to a supervisory or administrative action where the allegations originated from an examination of the licensee. These may include memoranda of understanding, cease and desist actions, civil penalty actions, and suspensions and revocations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after licensee ceases conducting business in Ohio, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
